# ItsBagelBot

> ItsBagelBot is an all-in-one Twitch companion bot for streamers: automated chat
> moderation, custom commands, timers, giveaways, polls, song requests, channel-points
> rewards, and game-stat integrations. Every feature is free forever, with no feature
> gates, no trials, and no card required. It is privacy-first (no trackers, no data sold)
> and source-available.

## What it is

- ItsBagelBot connects to a Twitch channel in one click and handles moderation and engagement so the streamer can focus on streaming.
- The entire toolkit is free. A paid Premium tier ($ CAD/month) only adds message priority and faster responses to keep the servers funded; it unlocks no exclusive features. An Enterprise tier serves organizations running many channels.
- Privacy-first: no third-party trackers, no data sold, chat content is not stored for resale.
- Source-available (not open source): the code can be read and audited on GitHub, but the license limits redistribution and commercial use.
- Runs on sustainable hydro-electric power; the site and dashboard rank cleaner than ~92% and ~95% of pages tested by Website Carbon.

## Key features

- Automated chat moderation: a multi-layer system (static rule gates + a classifier "jury" + a cross-channel raid-signature network) removes spam, slurs, and scam links, usually before viewers see them.
- Custom commands and variables with cooldowns and shout-outs.
- Timers, polls, giveaways (verifiably random draws), and self-managing song-request queues.
- Channel Points rewards, including a Govee smart-light integration (viewers redeem to drive stream lights).
- Game-stat integrations: Hypixel Bedwars stats and MCSR Ranked (Minecraft speedrun) Elo, pulled straight into chat.
- Setup takes about two minutes; rules read like sentences, not code. Uninstall anytime.

## Pages

- [Home](https://itsbagelbot.com/): product overview, features, and how it works.
- [Pricing](https://itsbagelbot.com/pricing): Free / Premium / Enterprise tiers and FAQ.
- [Guides](https://itsbagelbot.com/guides): visual guides — getting started, commands & variables, and the modules handbook.
- [Command Builder](https://itsbagelbot.com/command-builder): interactive tool to compose custom commands with variables and send them to the dashboard.
- [Contact](https://itsbagelbot.com/contact): Discord, support and enterprise email, GitHub.
- [Privacy Policy](https://itsbagelbot.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://itsbagelbot.com/terms)
- [Creator Code Terms](https://itsbagelbot.com/creator-terms): revenue-share program for creators.

## Product and resources

- [Dashboard](https://dashboard.itsbagelbot.com): sign in with Twitch to configure the bot.
- [Documentation](https://docs.itsbagelbot.com): guides, architecture, and reference.
- [Discord community](https://discord.gg/SZ2remwSDv): fastest support channel.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/AdamOusmer/ItsBagelBot): source code and issue tracker.

## Also available in

- [French / Français](https://itsbagelbot.com/fr/)
